# ngx-mat-table-exporter

An Angular directive that exports Angular Material (`mat-table`) tables to Excel (.xlsx), CSV, or JSON — with zero dependencies beyond `@angular/material`.

## Key facts

- **No third-party libraries.** No `xlsx`, `exceljs`, `file-saver`, or `jszip`. All writers are implemented from scratch in TypeScript.
- **Requires Angular 20+** (expected to work on Angular 17+).
- **Two export modes:** current page only (DOM scrape) or full data set (bypasses pagination).
- **Respects filter and sort** when using `MatTableDataSource`.
- **xlsx features:** auto-sized column widths, optional alternating row stripe color, optional bold headers, optional bottom header border.

## Installation

```bash
npm install ngx-mat-table-exporter
```

## Basic usage

```html
<mat-table [dataSource]="dataSource" ngxMatTableExporter #exporter="ngxMatTableExporter">
  <!-- columns -->
</mat-table>
<button (click)="exporter.exportCurrentPage()">Export page</button>
<button (click)="exporter.exportDataSource()">Export all</button>
```

```typescript
import { NgxMatTableExporterDirective } from 'ngx-mat-table-exporter';

@Component({
  standalone: true,
  imports: [MatTableModule, NgxMatTableExporterDirective],
})
export class MyComponent {}
```

## Export methods

- `exportCurrentPage(options?)` — exports the rows currently visible in the DOM (current page, active filter, active sort).
- `exportDataSource(options?)` — exports all rows from the data source, bypassing pagination but respecting filter and sort.

## ExportOptions

```typescript
interface ExportOptions {
  format?:    'xlsx' | 'csv' | 'json'; // default: 'xlsx'
  fileName?:  string;                  // default: 'ExportedData'
  sheetName?: string;                  // xlsx only, default: 'Data'
}
```

## Global configuration (optional)

Use `provideNgxMatTableExporter` in root providers to set default xlsx styling for all directives in the app. All options default to `false`/off — calling without any config is equivalent to not calling it at all.

```typescript
import { provideNgxMatTableExporter } from 'ngx-mat-table-exporter';

export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideNgxMatTableExporter({
      stripeRows: true,         // alternating row shading
      stripeColor: '#D9E8FB',   // hex color for stripe fill
      boldHeaders: true,        // bold header row
      bottomHeaderBorder: true, // bottom border on header cells
    }),
  ],
};
```

## Public API exports

- `NgxMatTableExporterDirective` — the directive
- `provideNgxMatTableExporter(config)` — global config provider
- `NGX_MAT_TABLE_EXPORTER_CONFIG` — the injection token
- `NgxMatTableExporterConfig` — config interface
- `ExportOptions` — export options interface
- `ExportFormat` — `'xlsx' | 'csv' | 'json'`
- `createXlsxBlob(rows, sheetName?, stripeColor?, boldHeaders?, bottomHeaderBorder?)` — xlsx writer
- `createCsvBlob(rows)` — csv writer
- `createJsonBlob(rows)` — json writer

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/ngx-mat-table-exporter
- GitHub: https://github.com/kevin-kieliszek/ngx-mat-table-exporter
- Live demo: https://kevin-kieliszek.github.io/ngx-mat-table-exporter/
